'''Bri'ahl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Bri'ahl sector/Legends|Bri'ahl sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was inhabited by the [[Bri'ahl (species)|Bri'ahls]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
Bri'ahl was neutral during most of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Toward the end of the galactic conflict, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Gregar Typho]] ventured to the world to try to persuade [[President/Legends|President]] [[Vuul]] to ally Bri'ahl with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. However, a resistance made up of [[Bri'ahl activists|activists]] dressed in [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] provided by a supportive [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] planned to [[Mission to Bri'ahl|infiltrate]] the [[Presidential palace (Bri'ahl)|Presidential palace]] and assassinate Senator Amidala and Vuul. However, the misadventures of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] caused the destruction of the entire rebellion, thus saving the lives of two important politicians. Without the interference of the activists, Vuul seemed inclined to agree to Amidala's suggestion. Bri'ahl probably became part of the Republic, and in several months, most likely the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Another Fine Mess" />

{{Planet-stub}}
